sections.paragraph:
verb לצוף

to float

verb לצוף

to flow; emerge

verb להצטפות

become coated, become plated, be covered

verb נצפה

be expected; foreseen; observed; watched

verb צופה (>>צֻפָּה)

be coated, covered, plated

verb להציף

to flood, inundate; set afloat; dump (goods)

verb הוצף

be flooded; set afloat; dumped (goods)

verb לצפות (>>ציפה)

to coat, cover, plate
